auth.title: Access your account
auth.description: Sign in with your registered mobile number to continue.

hero.title: Fresh milk, delivered every morning
hero.subtitle: Your scheduled delivery is on the way.

dashboard.title: My Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: Your milk plan, recent deliveries, and payment status.
dashboard.monthHint: Actual bill from delivered milk and add-ons
dashboard.planLine: Your plan is {plan}. Billed this month: {billed}. Pending: {due}.
dashboard.noCustomer: No customer record is available yet.
dashboard.noCustomerSubtitle: Your summary will appear here once customer data is available.

calendar.title: My Calendar
calendar.subtitle: See day-wise milk consumption, skipped days, and your monthly estimate.
calendar.estimateHint: Projected from delivered consumption and add-ons
calendar.headline: Consumption calendar
calendar.headlineHint: Daily entries for your milk plan in {month}.
calendar.noData: No calendar data is available yet.
calendar.emptySubtitle: Your calendar will appear here once delivery data is available.

billing.title: My Billing
billing.subtitle: Current month billing summary and pending due.
billing.noAddOns: No add-on products billed this month.

history.title: Delivery History
history.subtitle: Review recent delivery entries, extra milk, and add-on items.

profile.title: My Profile
profile.subtitle: Your contact information and delivery address.
profile.name: Name

landing.title: Multilingual starter for milk delivery management
landing.description: Responsive admin and customer panels, MongoDB foundation, and an INR-friendly billing flow.

statusItems.locales: English, Hindi, and Punjabi message files
statusItems.mongo: MongoDB connection helper and models included
statusItems.skeletons: Customer and admin skeleton pages ready

shell.workspaceDescription: Compact control room for customers, routes, billing, and daily delivery marks.
shell.helpDescription: Keep the morning route smooth with quick access to delivery and dues summaries.

dashboard.title: Admin Dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: A quick view of today's deliveries, customer status, outstanding dues, and purchase cycle.

stats.activeCustomersHint: {count} customers still need today's status update
stats.monthlySalesHint: Built from delivered milk and add-on products

hero.title: Deliveries, dues, and milk purchase operations from one compact control room.
hero.description: This dashboard now reads from live MongoDB records, so delivery status, extra milk, add-on products, payments, and inward purchase activity stay aligned in one place.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.subtitle: Thumb-friendly actions for customer delivery and supply cycle

progress.title: Progress
progress.subtitle: Live completion from customer, billing, and purchase records

attention.title: Delivery attention points
attention.subtitle: Customers needing a manual follow-up based on today's delivery or billing

performance.title: Daily performance
performance.subtitle: Quick snapshot of route, dues, and purchase-health metrics

customers.title: Customer Management
customers.subtitle: Manage customer profiles, milk quantities, and outstanding balances from live database records.
customers.listSubtitle: Search, filter, and open complete customer records from the same screen.
customers.newSubtitle: Enter the customer profile, milk plan, and area mapping.
customers.onboardingFormSubtitle: Designed for quick mobile data entry during route setup.

checklist.setRate: Set quantity and rate per liter
checklist.mapArea: Map the correct area code for analytics
checklist.addLandmark: Add gate, landmark, or doorstep note

customers.detailSubtitle: Customer plan, address, payments, and delivery records.
customers.noDeliveryLog: No delivery log found for the current month.

vendors.title: Vendors
vendors.subtitle: Manage external milk suppliers and their area mapping here.
vendors.note: Vendor master data feeds the daily purchase ledger, inward milk tracking, and unpaid supplier visibility.

deliveries.title: Today's Deliveries
deliveries.subtitle: One-tap actions for delivery marking, extra milk overrides, and add-on products.

stats.deliveredHint: Saved directly from today's delivery records
stats.pendingHint: Needs doorstep confirmation or status update
stats.pausedSkippedHint: Temporary plan changes or no-delivery entries

deliveries.note: Super admin can mark delivered customers, save one-time extra milk, and attach ad hoc products like ghee or lassi for the same date without breaking monthly analytics.

calendar.title: Calendar View
calendar.subtitle: Review day-wise consumption, peak days, and area-wise insights.

insights.title: Area consumption insights
insights.subtitle: Compare mapped customer count and liters by area.

billing.title: Billing & Payments
billing.subtitle: Track billed amount, paid amount, and due amount for every customer from live records.

stats.billedHint: Combined total from delivered milk and add-on line items
stats.receivedHint: UPI, bank, and cash entries reconciled

billing.accountsSubtitle: Compact ledger cards designed to stay readable on phones.

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Summary cards for area, delivery, billing, and purchase insights.

stats.areaCoverageHint: Area codes are used by customer and delivery analytics

reports.areaAnalyticsSubtitle: Customer count, consumption, billed amount, and dues based on area code mapping.
reports.trendSubtitle: Month-wise route demand built from real delivery records.

purchases.title: Purchase Ledger
purchases.subtitle: Track daily vendor purchases, milk inward, and supplier payment status.
purchases.note: Purchase rows stay separate from customer sales so outward billing and inward sourcing analytics remain logically correct.

areas.title: Area Management
areas.subtitle: Manage area codes, names, and status for customer mapping and analytics.

products.title: Products
products.subtitle: Manage rate cards for milk, ghee, lassi, and other add-on products.
products.note: Milk products drive consumption analytics, while add-on items stay billable without inflating milk-liter totals.
